name: The Fox's Dream
short_description: Solve puzzles and unravel mysteries with the little fox. Look for clues scattered around the level, find patterns in them and become a hero with the cute fox
detailed_description:
Many of us dreamed of becoming heroes, didn't we? And our main character, a little fox, also dreamed of doing something unusual, incredible, amazing...heroic in short.
So one day, waking up on the beach in complete unconsciousness, she realized that her time had come. At least, that's where all the cliched stories about heroes begin, so how is her situation worse, agree?
But who would we be if we left such a cute creature alone? It's scary to even think about it, so you must help her and in the end, as a noble hero, the fox will share a piece of her glory with you.

What awaits me in the game?

  • You will find 10 different locations from a forest with animals to a cursed house.
  • Explore the locations in search of clues.
  • Use your mind to connect all the elements together and move on.
  • Find side quests to get unique achievements.
  • Save the world from a terrible curse that is really, really scary... really.
  • Become a hero with a cute little fox.
